detectors.description:
SupplyChainCore.updateProductionStatus(uint256,bytes) (contracts/SupplyChainCore.sol#82-102) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(order.id != 0,SupplyChainCore: order not found) (contracts/SupplyChainCore.sol#87)
	- require(bool,string)(order.manufacturer == msg.sender,SupplyChainCore: not assigned manufacturer) (contracts/SupplyChainCore.sol#88)
	- require(bool,string)(order.status == OrderStatus.Created,SupplyChainCore: invalid status transition) (contracts/SupplyChainCore.sol#89)
